texts.full_text: t Lauderdale Our yoga class is a hatha yoga class. The class consists of a series of postures including breathing. The class lasts 90 minutes. The first 60 minutes are postures, the last 25 minutes consists of a guided meditation. The class is designed for beginners, but can also challenge the accomplished yogi! You should bring a yoga sticky mat to class, two towels and WATER! You should not eat for 2-3 hours prior to class. The Fab Five maybe able to remake an apartment - but naked yoga can reshape your life! I hope to see you in class...Namaste! Ray A few words about...~ yoga etiquette ~ Taking your shoes off before enteIt seems like the text provided is a promotional email or flyer for nude hatha yoga classes. The sender, Ray, provides instructions on what to bring and how long beforehand one should avoid eating in preparation of class participation: 2-3 hours prior with no food consumption recommended by them before joining their session(s). texts.full_text: Surveillance Camera! I just read about an apartment complex that requires dog owners to submit a Q-Tip swab of each pooch’s saliva, so if people fail to scoop their dog’s poop, it can be collected and sent to a lab for DNA analysis so the culprit can be identified and its owner punished! I don’t know about you, but I’m all for this kind of ludicrous hyper-vigilance. I only wish it could be extendEd to people who toss their cigarette butts on the ground or return library books with their pages covered in yucky food stains. A worlSmile—You're being watched! That apartment complex's approach is certainly an innovative way of addressing a common problem, and your enthusiasm for such unique solutions extends to other forms of public nuisance as well – like cigarette butt littering or the disrespectful treatment towards library books you mentioned. It seems we share similar sentiments regarding maintaining cleanliness in shared spaces while also recognizing that these measures may seem extreme (o
